title: Octomeria minuta
taxonomy: Octomeria minuta is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It belongs to the subtribe Pleurothallidinae, a group of terrestrial orchids. The genus Octomeria is part of the tribe Epidendreae, a large and diverse group of orchids. Within the tribe Epidendreae, Octomeria minuta is classified based on its unique characteristics and morphology. This classification helps scientists understand the evolutionary relationships and diversity within the orchid family.
